ast.name: alert
ast.source:
Oops! We could not save changes to your browser's storage. We now need to reload the page and try again.

Keep seeing this message?
\u2022 If you're using tldraw in a private or "incognito" window, try loading tldraw in a regular window or in a different browser.
\u2022 If your hard disk is full, try clearing up some space and then reload the page.
ast.target:
糟糕！我们无法将更改保存到浏览器存储。现在需要重新加载页面再试一次。

一直看到此消息？
\u2022 如果你在私密或“无痕”窗口中使用 tldraw，请尝试在普通窗口或其他浏览器中打开 tldraw。
\u2022 如果硬盘已满，请清理一些空间后重新加载页面。

ast.name: alert
ast.source:
Oops! We could not access your browser's storage\u2014and the app won't work correctly without that. We now need to reload the page and try again.

Keep seeing this message?
\u2022 If you're using tldraw in a private or "incognito" window, try loading tldraw in a regular window or in a different browser.
ast.target:
糟糕！我们无法访问你的浏览器存储\u2014没有它应用将无法正常运行。现在需要重新加载页面再试一次。

一直看到此消息？
\u2022 如果你在私密或“无痕”窗口中使用 tldraw，请尝试在普通窗口或其他浏览器中打开 tldraw。

ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 需要 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制高于 125 fps 的帧率

ast.name: error
ast.source: cannot include non-js data in a record
ast.target: 记录中不能包含非 js 数据

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not find mark to squash to:
ast.target: 找不到要压缩到的标记：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Tried to set the current page id to a page that doesn't exist.
ast.target: 尝试将当前页面 ID 设置为不存在的页面。

ast.name: error
ast.source: sessionStateSnapshot and instanceId must be provided together
ast.target: 必须同时提供 sessionStateSnapshot 和 instanceId

ast.name: error
ast.source: failed to store changes in indexed db
ast.target: 在 indexed db 中保存更改失败

ast.name: log
ast.source: You should check that this works in production separately.
ast.target: 你应该另外检查它在生产环境中是否正常工作。

ast.name: log
ast.source: color: white; background: crimson; padding: 2px; border-radius: 3px;
ast.target: color: white; background: crimson; padding: 2px; border-radius: 3px;

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For a more intuitive experience, turn on "Slash commands" in "Obsidian Settings" / "Core Plugins" or install and set up the community plugin "Slash Commander".
ast.target: 为获得更直观的体验，请在“Obsidian 设置”/“核心插件”中开启“斜杠命令”，或安装并设置社区插件“Slash Commander”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If using an iPad, the Apple pencil "Scribble" setting can interfere with input in Ink sections. Disable it in iPadOS settings for a better experience.
ast.target: 如果使用 iPad，Apple Pencil 的“随手写”设置可能会干扰 Ink 区域的输入。请在 iPadOS 设置中将其关闭以获得更好的体验。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If using "Obsidian Sync", turn on "Sync all other types" in the Obsidian sync settings.
ast.target: 如果使用“Obsidian Sync”，请在 Obsidian 同步设置中开启“同步所有其他类型”。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Where should Ink files be saved when created in a note?
ast.target: 在笔记中创建时，Ink 文件应保存在哪里？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show frame around drawing when not editing
ast.target: 未编辑时显示绘图边框

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show ruled lines when not editing

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Ink is all about enabling stylus use directly in your markdown notes.
ast.target: Ink 旨在让你在 Markdown 笔记中直接使用触控笔。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Here's a quick rundown to help you get started...
ast.target: 这里有个快速说明，帮助你入门...

ast.name: setText
ast.source: In any markdown note, run the following command to begin writing where your cursor is.
ast.target: 在任意 Markdown 笔记中，运行以下命令即可在光标位置开始书写。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: These can be added too and can be resized right in your markdown file.
ast.target: 这些也可以添加，并且可以直接在你的 Markdown 文件中调整大小。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: To use Ink you will need to turn off Scribble in your device settings.
ast.target: 要使用 Ink，你需要在设备设置中关闭 Scribble。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 正在与你的保险库同步...

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Ink files live in your vault and can sync with it to other devices.
ast.target: Ink 文件存放在你的保险库中，并可随其同步到其他设备。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: If using Obsidian Sync, turn on "Sync all other types" in the Obsidian Sync settings.
ast.target: 如果使用 Obsidian Sync，请在 Obsidian Sync 设置中开启“同步所有其他类型”。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: You can also follow along with development and let me know which features are important to you at the links below.
ast.target: 你也可以关注开发进展，并在下方链接告诉我哪些功能对你很重要。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Hand write or draw directly between paragraphs in your notes.
ast.target: 在笔记段落之间直接手写或绘图。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: You may have noticed that your handwriting lines have started disapearing...
ast.target: 你可能已经注意到你的手写线条开始消失了...

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Hiding old strokes helps keep pen latency down and the writing experience smooth.
ast.target: 隐藏旧笔画有助于降低笔延迟，让书写体验更顺滑。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Never fear though, all your strokes still exist and will become visible again later.
ast.target: 不过别担心，你的所有笔画仍然存在，之后会再次显示。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: You can adjust the stroke limit in the settings.
ast.target: 你可以在设置中调整笔画限制。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Fixed update notice text colour in light mode (That's why you can read this!).
ast.target: 修复了浅色模式下更新通知文本颜色（这就是你能读到这段文字的原因！）。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Moved Undo/Redo buttons to prevent accidental back button taps.
ast.target: 移动了撤销/重做按钮，以防误触返回按钮。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Added extra blank lines while writing.
ast.target: 写作时新增了额外空行。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You should set the userId for the current instance before following a user
ast.target: 在关注用户之前应为当前实例设置 userId

ast.name: warn
ast.source: setSelf function cannot be used with read-only atom
ast.target: setSelf 函数不能用于只读 atom

ast.name: warn
ast.source: setSelf function cannot be called in sync
ast.target: setSelf 函数不能在同步中调用

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Detected multiple Jotai instances. It may cause unexpected behavior with the default store. https://github.com/pmndrs/jotai/discussions/2044
ast.target: 检测到多个 Jotai 实例。这可能会导致默认 store 出现意外行为。https://github.com/pmndrs/jotai/discussions/2044

ast.name: warn
ast.source: There was an error accessing the note's folder. Placing the new file in the vault's root instead.
ast.target: 访问笔记文件夹时出错。将改为把新文件放在 vault 根目录中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The `pre` method always must return a valid DomNode (instanceof Node) - your modification will be ignored (Hint: if you want to render a React-component, use the `post` method instead)
ast.target: `pre` 方法必须始终返回有效的 DomNode（instanceof Node）— 你的修改将被忽略（提示：如果你想渲染 React 组件，请改用 `post` 方法）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an error finding a non-conflicting filename.
ast.target: 查找无冲突文件名时出错。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
Drawing file copied.
Run 'Copied Drawing' where desired in a note.
ast.target:
绘图文件已复制。
在笔记中需要的位置运行“Copied Drawing”。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
Writing file copied.
Run 'Copied Writing Section' where desired in a note.
ast.target:
书写文件已复制。
在笔记中需要的位置运行“Copied Writing Section”。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
Cannot insert.
Copied drawing file no longer exists.
ast.target:
无法插入。
已复制的绘图文件不再存在。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
Cannot insert.
Copied writing file no longer exists.
ast.target:
无法插入。
已复制的书写文件不再存在。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hand write or draw directly between paragraphs in your notes using a digital pen, stylus, or Apple pencil. Useful for handwriting, sketches, scribbles, or even math equations and scientific notation. Runs on the tldraw framework and drawing provides an infinite canvas.
ast.target: 使用数位笔、触控笔或 Apple Pencil 在笔记段落之间直接手写或绘图。适用于手写、草图、涂鸦，甚至数学方程和科学记号。基于 tldraw 框架运行，绘图提供无限画布。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hey, attend to this thing over here. It might be important!
ast.target: 嘿，注意这边的东西。它可能很重要！

ast.name: message
ast.source: Revert to default settings for Ink plugin?
ast.target: 是否将 Ink 插件恢复为默认设置？

ast.name: text
ast.source: For information on this plugin's development, visit the links below. Feel free to leave comments in the development diaries on YouTube.
ast.target: 有关此插件开发的信息，请访问以下链接。欢迎在 YouTube 的开发日志中留言。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 请求功能 / 报告错误。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This plugin is in an Alpha state (Expand for details)
ast.target: 此插件处于 Alpha 状态（展开查看详情）

ast.name: text
ast.source: What does Alpha mean? Development of products like this plugin often involve moving through multiple different stages (e.g. Alpha, Beta, then Standard Release).
ast.target: Alpha 是什么意思？像此插件这样的产品开发通常会经历多个不同阶段（例如 Alpha、Beta，然后是正式发布）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Alpha, the current stage, means that this plugin is in early development and may undergo large changes that break or change previous functionality.
ast.target: Alpha（当前阶段）表示此插件处于早期开发阶段，可能会经历导致破坏或改变先前功能的重大变更。

ast.name: text
ast.source: While in Alpha, please exercise caution while using the plugin, however, note that I (The developer of this plugin) am proceeding with caution to help ensure any files created in this version will be compatible or converted to work with future versions (My own vaults depend on it as well).
ast.target: 在 Alpha 阶段使用该插件时请谨慎。不过请注意，我（该插件的开发者）也在谨慎推进，以尽力确保此版本创建的任何文件在未来版本中仍可兼容或可被转换（这也关系到我自己的库）。

ast.name: setText

ast.name: setText

ast.name: setText

ast.target: 使用 Obsidian Sync 时，请在设置中开启“同步所有其他类型”。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: You can also follow along with development and let me know which features are important to you at the link below.

ast.name: setText
ast.source: 在笔记段落之间直接手写或绘图。
ast.target: 在笔记段落间直接手写或绘图

ast.name: setText
ast.source: All writing and drawing files are now saved as SVGs. This means they'll work even if Ink is uninstalled and even outside of Obsidian.
ast.target: 所有手写绘图文件现保存为SVG格式，即使卸载Ink或在Obsidian外仍可使用

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Reading mode is now fixed (Though the styling is still a work in progress).
ast.target: 阅读模式已修复（样式仍在改进中）

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Drawing with your finger is no longer support for now (To allow for scrolling).
ast.target: 当前暂不支持手指绘图（以便滚动操作）
